precheck.description: Check handle-nulls-user-displayName has work to do
precheck.sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

postcheck.sql: SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT "id" AS "id" FROM "user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL LIMIT 1) AS ok

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'displayName'
)
SELECT NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."user" WHERE "displayName" IS NULL)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."user" ALTER COLUMN "displayName" SET NOT NULL

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'displayName'
    AND is_nullable = 'NO'
)
